form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr5) over 1780m after showing early speed at this track beaten 22 m by Eternal Bliss (2:09.00) in Up to 3 LTW on March 25 at $51. form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Last start won by a head as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr1) at this track (2:31.30) beating Cherries On Top in Up to 3 LTW on March 18 at $2.40. Hard to leave out on current form. Has a strong record at this circuit, scoring three wins from seven starts.
